name: Budget Tracker Statusline
description: Financial dashboard statusline for Claude Code. Tracks session cost, hourly spend rate, and provides budget warning icons that escalate with spending intensity.
features: Budget warning icons: 💰 normal, 💸 high spend (>$1/hr), 🚨 very high (>$5/hr)
Daily spend estimate shown when session > 60s
Context usage percentage with color coding
